productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure patent leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Patent leather upper with a glossy effect Has a supple leather inner lining for breathable all-day comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a raised and textured heel for grip and ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
